spectre.note: patch's standout winner — calmer early game lets her farm & scale (~55% WR)

wraith-king.note: one of the highest win rates this patch (~54%)

faceless-void.note: most-picked carry; Battlefury + Aghs Chrono build (~53%)

drow-ranger.note: benefited from the slower tempo (~53.5% WR)

juggernaut.note: strong lane, healing ward + Omnislash pickoffs

sniper.note: back in the meta — easier after mobility-hero nerfs

kez.note: viable agi carry, limited high-MMR data

shadow-fiend.note: niche as a pos-1 this patch

phantom-lancer.note: niche but strong after the tempo nerfs

ursa.note: topped pos-1 win rate earlier in 7.41

meepo.note: snowballs hard if you can pilot him

troll-warlord.note: bullies the lane, falls off late

sven.note: huge Cleave crits + God's Strength; a pub wrecking ball
